findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "create_account" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Create a free account for bearer attribution. The full account key is returned once; only its SHA-256 and last four characters are retained.
